changes: clusters/teams: card column order changed to radar → bars → season list
clusters/teams: card columns reordered to bars → radar → seasons; radar enlarged to 300px
clusters/teams: dim bars moved into card body as a third column filling remaining width
clusters/teams: larger radar (200px) and fixed-width team list (360px) in archetype cards
clusters/teams: archetype cards display as a single full-width column
clusters/teams: archetype sections no longer collapse each other — each card opens and closes independently
clusters/teams: rework clustering dimensions — PACE uses true possessions formula, add ASSIST_RATE to Stage 1, replace PPG/TS% with OFF_RTG in Stage 2, fix DEF_RTG sign bug
clusters/teams: PCA x,y coordinates computed dynamically in cluster script
clusters/teams: update all archetype names, descriptions, and group headers to match new clustering
clusters/teams: clicking a team dot shows team-season info strip below the chart
clusters/teams: card team rows show "22-23 NYK" format; grid layout fixes record/result column shift
clusters/teams: opening a card closes any other open card (accordion)
clusters/teams: don't scroll to card on bubble click — stay on chart to see the dots
clusters/teams: archetypes redesign — PCA bubble chart shows cluster relationships; all 12 cards always visible grouped by supergroup; removed click-to-reveal; mobile-responsive 1-col layout
clusters/teams: avg PO W now shows actual game wins (from playoff-brackets.csv), not series wins
clusters/teams: show avg reg wins and avg playoff wins per archetype cluster
clusters: split into /clusters/players/ and /clusters/teams/; /clusters/ redirects to players
clusters/teams: two-stage hierarchical clustering of 150 team-seasons across 12 archetypes (8 dims: PPG, DEF, TS%, 3PA rate, FTA rate, pace, rotation depth, star share)
clusters/teams: Team History tab — select a team, see their archetype across all tracked seasons
clusters: Player Journey redesign — node graph as main focus, click a season node to reveal the detail card below
clusters: rename and reorder all 16 archetypes; add description blurbs to each cluster card
clusters: add Player Journey tab — search for a player and see their archetype across seasons with radar + dim bars per season
clusters: two-stage clustering — stage 1 groups by shot diet (3pt rate, FT rate, usage), stage 2 refines within each group by TS%, playmaking, and defense
New page: /clusters — k-means (k=10) clustering of 2236 player-seasons across all NBN seasons; each cluster shows a centroid radar and closest representative players
players: radar chart axis order — offense right (PPG, APG, TS%, 3PT, FTA), defense left (STL, BLK, RPG)
players: Stretch Big and Paint Beast archetypes now require PF/C position — wings no longer misclassified as bigs
players: Defensive Anchor no longer requires low PPG — elite BLK + elite STL is sufficient
players: add Defensive Playmaker archetype for elite APG + elite STL
players: Rim Protector archetype now triggers on elite BLK + good TS%, not just when BLK is the top percentile dim
players: rename 'Scorer' archetype to 'Elite Scorer' so tier hierarchy reads correctly
players: raise radar chart minimum games threshold from 10 to 20
players: radar chart axes and labels colored by percentile tier — bronze (<50), silver (50–80), gold (80–95), purple (95–100)
players: radar chart on player profiles showing 8 per-game percentile dimensions (PPG, 3PT, TS%, APG, FTA, RPG, BLK, STL) vs same-season peers
teams: reorganize team pages into tabs — Overview (season history, personnel, roster, cap exceptions, picks), Draft History, All-Time Players, Historical Rosters (per-season stats by season selector)
invest: market summary section at top of Wall Street page — top 3 risers and fallers by price % change; toggle between 10G, 20G (default), and 82G windows
bet: fixed odds bets no longer void when nobody picks the winner — losers still lose; house keeps the stakes
bet/balances: redesigned table — ranked by Net Worth (liquid + equity), new Bet P/L and Inv P/L columns, Equity column for open positions, Earned collapsed from 3 columns to 1
invest: add 8 tradeable indexes — EAST/WEST (conference) and NATL/CTRL/SE/NW/PAC/SW (divisional); price tracks the daily average return of constituent teams
members/{name}: new Achievements section with 21 badges across GM performance, longevity, betting, and investing
Achievements track championships, finals appearances, FOTY/COTY, ratings records, playoff streaks, bet wins, tips, and investment returns
Locked achievements shown as greyed-out cards; tiered badges (Bronze/Silver/Gold) reflect milestone level
New API: GET /api/bets/stats/{member} — wager count, net P&L, win streak, odds, tips sent
New API: GET /api/invest/stats/{member} — trade count, realized P&L, best trade, short profit flag

members/{name}: GM performance achievements (Champion, Finals, Conf Finals, Postseason, Bridesmaid, Seasoned GM) now derived from tenure history + standings data instead of owner_stats.csv — credits any staff role present during a season
New page: NBN Wall Street (/invest) — buy and sell fractional team shares with NB¥
Share prices compound all-time using SOS-adjusted point differential algorithm (2× multiplier for playoff games)
Portfolio page shows equity, liquid balance, net worth, per-holding P/L, and equity chart over time
Leaderboard ranks all members by total net worth (equity + liquid)
Bookie/admin can lock and unlock the market
All trades logged to NB¥ ledger; homepage card added next to Bets
Season Stats: add team roster filter — select a team to show only players currently on that roster
history: stat leaders always from CSV for all seasons; awards from ballots for post-cutoff seasons
history: restore 25-26 statistical leaders (LEGACY_CUTOFF bump)
/draft/live: queue multiple players in ranked order; auto-submit picks first available; reorder with ↑/↓ buttons; + Queue button on player pool rows
/draft/live: remove live toggle — page is always active; state is determined by round1_date and pick windows
/draft/live: show My Picks panel and Draft Board regardless of live status; queue/submit actions still gate on live
Add /draft/live: live draft show page with YouTube embed, on-the-clock countdown, queued picks, draft board with reveal mechanic, and available player pool
Add API endpoints: GET/PATCH /api/draft/live, PUT /api/draft/queue/{team}, POST /api/draft/pick, POST /api/draft/reveal
Add backend auto-submit scheduler: queued player is submitted automatically at window end
Migrate build pipeline to nbn-today/build/: strip Shiny/RDS/Sheets cruft, write CSVs directly to repo, rewire nbn-api trigger
Awards results: BOD members see full ballot on hover for any team chip in the ballot tracker
Players: game log pagination and playoff-round badges on game log entries
Team pages: Franchise Personnel section — full tenure history with per-tenure W/L record
Players index: add career G column (after OVR, before Age)
Players index: add Missing OVR filter button
Awards results: ballot tracker distinguishes complete vs incomplete vs pending ballots; hover incomplete chips to see which awards are missing
Add /strikes page (BOD-gated): issue, view, and delete member strikes with date and reason
Members page: show strike count badge next to names of members with active strikes
Homepage: Strikes card visible to BOD members under League Office
API: GET/POST /api/strikes, GET/POST/DELETE /api/strikes/{member}/{id}
Team pages: remove Contract Timeline section (redundant with salary columns already in the roster table)
Trade Simulator at /trade-sim/ — pick two teams, select players/picks, get live salary matching validation against §4.2/§4.3 rules with apron and hard-cap checks
Player Comparison page at /compare/ — pick two players to see side-by-side career stats, awards, and contract; ⇆ Compare button on all player profiles
Team pages: Contract Timeline section showing salary commitments by year with color-coded player/two-way/dead-cap/option rows and per-year totals
nav.js: fix search button timing on pages where nav.js loads async (e.g. team pages)
Site-wide player search: Ctrl+K (or ⌕ button in nav) opens fuzzy overlay — searches all players by name, shows position and OVR
Players: OVR history sparkline chart above the ratings table — area fill + line + endpoint labels
Expand css/shared.css with reset, body base, link styles, and sortable thead styles — removes ~400 more lines of inline CSS across 51 pages
Deduplicate nav CSS and parseCSV/parseLine across 46 pages into shared css/shared.css and nav.js
Perry Game: allow the same player to be picked for multiple team slots (same team still can't appear twice)
Perry Game: fix daily reset cron — now archives outgoing day's entries even if cron fails to fire on time
Daily Perry Game: daily puzzle with 6 random teams, fill PG/SG/SF/PF/C/6th Man slots from each team's history, scored by best-season GMSC; leaderboard, optimal solution reveal, NB¥ prizes for top 3
Members: add individual profile pages at /members/<name>/
Members: NB¥ tipping — send NB¥ to any member; tips of NB¥25+ may include a public message
Members: tip list displayed on each member's profile page
Bets: lower player bio field reward from NB¥100 to NB¥10 per field
Bets: add 'How to earn NB¥' expandable info panel above tabs
Bets: add Bio column to Balances table
API: award NB¥100 per newly-filled player bio field (auto, tracked per slug:field)
Bets: support multiple winning options when closing a bet (for cumulative props like stocks thresholds)
Homepage: reorder About section cards — Members, Roles & Permissions, Constitution, Rulebook, Data Files, Changelog
History: fix duplicate rows per season (CSV has one row per team; deduplicate to one per season and source champion from bracket data)
Constitution: switch to API-backed Markdown — BOD can edit in-browser; auto-generated TOC; version history at the bottom
Constitution: new native page at /constitution/ — 16 articles, sidebar TOC; Articles VIII–XII defer to Rulebook; BOD-editable amendment log at the bottom
Homepage: Constitution card now links to /constitution/ instead of Google Docs
Proposals: replace EasyMDE with a clean custom Markdown editor (toolbar, Write/Preview tabs, Ctrl+B/I/K shortcuts)
Box scores: sort players by descending points within each team
Box score submit: NBYen awarded when adding to queue; duplicate game detection across committed data and pending queues
Standings: in playoff bracket, always show higher seed on top within each series card
Standings: fix playoff bracket seed ordering to 1v8, 4v5, 3v6, 2v7 (with play-in and reseeded-bracket support)
Add favicon: logo.png now appears in browser tabs across all pages
Bets: enforce NB¥300 maximum total stake per member per bet
Bets/Balances: split Bet Lost into Bet Lost (resolved losers) and Bet Placed (live wagers on open/locked bets)
Bets: post Discord notifications when a bet is created, locked, or settled
Trivia: add Games Played (G) column between Team and MPG
Bets/Balances tab: add Bet Won, Bet Lost, Stats, Trivia breakdown columns per member
Trivia: earn NB¥ for correct answers — doubles each streak (1→2→4→…→512, cap at 10+); live session total shown during play
Bets: add admin-only History tab showing full NB¥ balance ledger
Bets: Fixed Odds no longer requires probabilities to sum to 100%; shows amber warning instead
Bets: fix negative P/L values missing minus sign on Balances tab
Bets: Balances tab hides former members by default; toggle to show them
Roles: consolidate 'bets' role into 'bookie' — bets was redundant and unused
Roles: add 'bookie' role card to Roles & Permissions page
Members: add 'bets' and 'bookie' to the role checkboxes in the member editor
Bets: add 'bookie' role — can create, lock, close, and delete bets
Bets: Fixed Odds form now accepts American odds (+150, -200) alongside probability %; both fields auto-sync
Bets: add pre-canned 'New Bet' wizard (Margin of Victory and Player Props O/U bets from calendar games)
Bets: rename manual bet creation to 'New Custom Bet'
Bets: add Fixed Odds bet type — creator sets implied probability per option, payouts lock in at wager time
Box Score submission: award NB¥10 to the submitter on both Screenshot Upload and Manual Entry commits
Bets: add Locked state — close betting without setting an outcome yet; outcome can be set later
Homepage: admin League Office — Adjust NB¥ card lets admins give or take NBYen from any member with optional reason; shows current balance after member selection and old→new balance after apply

NBYen Bets: members start with NB¥1,000; 'bets' role creates bets with 2+ options; any member can wager and top up; parimutuel payout splits pool proportionally to winners; zero-winner bets refund all stakes; Balances leaderboard shows P/L vs starting NB¥1,000

Homepage: admin-only 'Post Standings to Discord' control in League Office section — posts a formatted embed to #stats-and-standings with per-conference standings table and playoff results; season picker covers all 6 NBN seasons

Calendar: BoD can schedule games (away @ home + optional note) via new 'Add game(s)' button; supports multi-game entry; scheduled games appear in schedule and month views with blue styling and BoD delete
Proposals: eligible voters can now be set by tenure position (Owners, GMs, Coaches) in addition to roles; OR logic between the two criteria
Homepage: add Proposals card under League section
Proposals: new /proposals section — members can draft, submit, comment on, and vote on league proposals
Proposals: BOD can open and close voting; results revealed only after closing
Proposals: per-proposal eligible voter roles (all GMs or BOD only)
API: GET /api/members/me — returns authenticated member's name and roles

Picks: multi-team ownership — owner field supports pipe-separated candidates (e.g. ATL|BKN); pick appears in 'Owner TBD' section on every candidate team's page; edit mode owner field is now a text input accepting single team, ATL|BKN, or ?
Picks: support '?' as owner for picks with undetermined ownership — shows in a separate 'Owner TBD' section (amber); API validates and routes these to the orig team
Transactions: auto-scroll validation panel into view after submit
Fix homepage reveal-awards toggle disappearing — lo-boxscore null ref threw TypeError before isAdmin block ran
History: 24-25 and earlier from metadata.R CSV; 25-26+ postseason from playoff-brackets.csv, awards from ballot data (shown only when revealed)
Manual entry: game queue — add multiple games then commit all + one rebuild; rename PF→FLS, reorder stat columns to match in-game display, DR auto-derived
Box Score Import: add Manual Entry tab — pick teams, load rosters from API, fill in stats inline, commit directly without screenshots
Consolidate box score import: /boxscores/submit/ is now the Box Score Import page; /boxscore/ removed
Homepage lo-boxscore card updated to /boxscores/submit/
Box score submit (/boxscores/submit/): fix blank page — xterm CDN now loads lazily on first Parse click instead of blocking page render
Box Score Import (/boxscore/): pending queue now has per-row remove button and upload timestamp
Box score submit: stats role token entry on page; pending queue shows upload timestamp; API adds uploaded_at to meta.json
Rulebook § 1.3: Hard Cap calculation method, scope (active + dead cap), grace period rules and August 31st compliance deadline
Add league Hard Cap threshold — cap settings, roster salary footer, frivolities viz, rulebook § 1.1 / § 1.3; API enforces it on all transaction paths
Box score queue: add remove button per pending game

Rulebook: 23 gaps filled from prior constitution — cap pegged to NBA cap, post-regular-season hard cap timing, in-season roster minimums and activity strike system, Two-Way eligibility and conversion rules, MLE annual scaling, BAE expiry/refresh, Gilbert Arenas provision, cap holds schedule, max contracts, minimum contracts, contract structure, sign-and-trade rules, RFA offer sheets and matching, full extension eligibility, extension submission windows, first/second round signing deadlines, second round contract structures, retaining overseas draft rights, international player rights section

Calendar: rename 'Show past games' to 'Show past events'; add custom events — BOD/admin can add/delete dated events with a label via '+ Add event' button; custom events shown in violet in both schedule and month views; add GET/POST/DELETE /api/calendar/events and GET /api/auth/me endpoints
Calendar schedule view: default to future-only; past games load 30 at a time via 'Show past games' button

Calendar: add Schedule view (default) — vertical timeline of game results and vesting events; Month grid still available via toggle; schedule shows last 30 game days + all upcoming vesting, with '↑ Load earlier' pagination

Calendar: show NON_GTD contract vesting dates — amber pips with player name, team, and amount; clicking a pip navigates to the player profile; multi-player dates show a count chip with first two names
Fix: player bio edit no longer clears jersey number — jersey_number is now preserved in the save payload
Player bio edit form: add Notes textarea for free-form contract/roster notes (e.g. 'No trade clause', 'Matched RFA offer')
Rulebook: § 2.1 roster size, § 3.9 raise/decrease limits, § 4.2 salary matching, § 4.3 First Apron trade rules — all now system-enforced (badges updated)
Homepage: move Rulebook card from League section to About section
Rulebook: article titles now shown in sidebar TOC below article number
Retire rules/*.md: rulebook/index.html is now the single source of truth for all league rules; CLAUDE.md updated to reference article/section numbers instead of markdown files
Add /rulebook/ — CBA-style document with 7 articles, 29 sections, live season cap thresholds from API, and per-rule system-enforced / manual-review badges
Transaction validation: hard cap check — blocks any signing, trade, pick, or two-way conversion that would push a hard-capped team over their apron threshold
NON_GTD contracts: multi-step guarantee schedules — each vesting milestone has its own date and amount; old single-step format still works for existing contracts
Tradeblock: normalize salary display — raw numbers now formatted as dollar amounts
Members: admin Copy Token button to copy a member's current token to clipboard without rotating it
Tradeblock: add Picks filter chip to show only picks; position filters now hide picks unless Picks chip is also active
Tradeblock: picks with assigned numbers show the slot number on the badge (e.g. '2026 2nd · #51')
Tradeblock: pick protection/condition notes (from picks database) shown as hover tooltip on badge with purple dot indicator
Tradeblock: pick notes shown as hover tooltip on badge (purple dot indicator); notes column suppressed for pick rows
Tradeblock: fix picks dropdown to use /api/picks/{team} so only picks you own appear
Members: add /members/ page — canonical identity for all league participants, unifying owner stats history and API tokens into a single members.json store keyed by canonical username
Members: migrate all 46 historical owners from owners.csv (with computed tenure start/end dates) and 13 token holders into members.json; names standardized to match stats pipeline
Members: admin can create members (token auto-generated, shown once), rotate tokens, and delete members; BOD can edit team tenures; all via /members/ UI
Members: add Members card to homepage after Owners card
Roles: simplify /roles/ active tokens section to read-only member list using new /api/members/public endpoint; link to /members/ for management
API: add /api/members/* endpoints (public list, admin full list, create, patch, rotate-token, delete); /api/tokens/* kept as compatibility shims
Players: add notes field to player bios; shown as a hover tooltip (◦ icon) on the player name in team roster tables
Transactions: two-way contract input simplified to Years + Starting Season; contract is auto-generated as N×$0 (guaranteed) + $1 RFA cap hold in year N+1
Frivolities salary viz: fix dead cap entries missing from chart — now fetches per-team dead cap data from the API alongside roster data
Remove legacy dead cap roster designation: drop TYPE=dead filters, migration shims, and Dead Cap contract type option now that all dead cap lives in per-team deadcap CSVs
Add Box Scores page (/boxscores/): browse game results by date with expandable per-team stat tables and prev/next date navigation; linked from homepage Stats section
Box Score Import: upload two 2K screenshots, Claude parses both teams' stats, review and commit to allstats CSVs
Roles page: admin can create tokens, edit name/roles, and delete tokens directly from the UI
NBN Trivia: add Age column to stats table (age as of Oct 1 of the season start year)
NBN Trivia: show all stat columns every round (no hidden columns)
Add 60-second countdown timer to NBN Trivia; timer turns red in the last 10 seconds; running out of time ends the game like a wrong answer

Add NBN Trivia game (/trivia): guess the player from their season-by-season averages; player pool is anyone with 100+ career games; three of eight stat categories revealed per round; streak-based scoring; leaderboard stored server-side via GET/POST /api/trivia/scores (best score per person, auth required to submit)
Clarify Roster OVRs average label to show it's top-6 average
Rename /compare to /frivolities to match nav label; old URL redirects
Add Traded Away picks section to team draft picks page
Dead cap add form: replace slug input with player name autocomplete
Add Transaction History table to player profiles; API supports filtering by player slug (including trade participants)
Fix: transactions form now supports guaranteed amounts and guarantee dates on NON_GTD years, matching bio edit form; ContractIn model updated to carry these fields through to player bio
Add Awards page (/awards/) listing seasons; unrevealed seasons show ballot-pending message; admin can toggle reveal per season from homepage League Office section

Redesign awards results pages: major awards (MVP, DPOY, ROTY, 6MOY, MIP, FOTY, COTY) show gold/silver/bronze podium top-3 above vote breakdown table; All-NBN rows colored gold (1-5), silver (6-10), bronze (11-15); All-Defense and All-Rookie rows colored gold (1-5), silver (6-10)
Add 'bod' role: inherits all rosters permissions; bod members can preview unrevealed award seasons that show a locked message to other members
Update Roles & Permissions page with BOD role card and badge styling

Move 24-25 awards ballot data from Google Sheets to on-disk JSON (awards-ballots-24-25.json); ballot entries stored as player slugs and team abbreviations (not display names); add GET/PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season} endpoints with reveal-gated auth; 24-25 awards page fetches player bios to resolve slugs to display names at render time; add ballot tracker at bottom of awards page showing which teams submitted

Move 25-26 awards ballot data to on-disk JSON (awards-ballots-25-26.json); add PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} for per-team ballot editing (ongoing voting); 25-26 awards page polls every 60s and shows ballot tracker; placeholder entries (PERIM, SWISHY) cleaned to null

Add awards ballot vote pages at /awards/{season}/vote/: shows team's current ballot (identified by token), drag-to-reorder picks, player/team autocomplete search, auto-saves on change; read-only if season is revealed; add GET /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} endpoint (team-role gated for unrevealed seasons); PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} now accepts team-role tokens in addition to rosters; move results pages to /awards/{season}/results/ with old URLs redirecting; awards index links team members to vote page for open seasons

Scaffold two-tier transaction validation: errors block, warnings can be force-overridden; stub validators in place for all 6 transaction types; validation panel on transactions page shows check results before applying
Add 'How to Rosters' documentation page at /how-to-rosters/ covering token setup, transactions, team page edits, player records, and cap settings; linked from League Office
Remove duplicate global cap level fields (Salary Cap, Aprons, MLE/BAE amounts) from team page edit form; rename button to 'Edit Team State' — these already exist in League Office > Cap Settings
Add GET/PUT /api/deadcap/{team} endpoints for managing dead cap entries
Dead cap edit UI on team pages (Edit Dead Cap button, inline form, requires rosters token)
_apply_release transaction now automatically writes dead cap to the team's deadcap CSV
Dead cap modeled as separate per-team {abbr}-deadcap.csv files (SLUG + season columns) instead of roster CSV entries; dead cap now counts toward teamSalaryTotal for apron/cap comparisons
ATL: migrated Zach Collins dead cap ($3,960,000 in 25-26) to atl-deadcap.csv
Add Frivolities & Viz page with tabbed OVR visualizations and salary chart; salary tab shows stacked horizontal bars per team with threshold lines for cap/aprons, colored by contract type
Filter pick transaction player autocomplete to the selected draft year's class only
Move draft year selector above player field in pick transaction form
Add Rookie Scale page (League Office) showing first-round contract amounts by pick and draft year
Remove TPE references from trade rules; add no-TPE statement, options-travel note, roster size and trade deadline placeholders
Add Stepien Rule and 7-year advance limit to draft pick trading rules
Add Base Year Compensation (BYC) rules for sign-and-trade salary matching
Add First Apron restriction for sign-and-trade receiving teams
Add FA signing trade restriction and touch rule to trade rules
Add minimum contract incoming salary exception to trade rules
Add tiered salary-matching rules and re-acquisition restriction to trade rules
Fix DOB off-by-one-day display bug caused by UTC vs local time parsing
FA signing player search now scoped to unrostered, unretired players
Rename /league-settings to /cap-settings; update page title and heading to match
Rename League Settings card to Cap Settings
Add League Office section to homepage (role-gated, visible to rosters/admin)
Add Cap Settings page at /cap-settings — edit cap, apron, and MLE amounts by season
Fix pre-commit hook to skip version bump on changelog-only commits
Add missing changelog entries for v0.0.3 and v0.0.4
Add About section to homepage; move Changelog, Roles & Permissions, and Data Files cards there
Remove duplicate 0.0.1 changelog entry
Add versioning system with auto-incrementing patch version on each commit
Add changelog page at /changelog with full version history
Add function index to teams/team.js for faster navigation
Add common task lookup table and architecture callouts to CLAUDE.md
